economic_notes: KRW Limited Partnership (Brandon Lands) with Rolling River and Waywayseecappo First Nations for real property development - no activity in current year. Gaming Centre and Gas Bar operated as business enterprises. 6-unit housing rehabilitation project commenced.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Audit was signed November 18, 2022 - over 18 months after year-end. Segment disclosure total expenses of 13,051,779 differs from statement of operations which shows operating expenses of 12,003,846 plus amortization of 1,047,933 = 13,051,779 - these reconcile. Annual debt service calculated as long-term debt repayment of 480,167 plus capital lease repayment of 29,127 = 509,294. Total government transfers include ISC 9,602,208 + CMHC 725,484 + Parks Canada 195,000 + First Peoples Development Inc. 212,040 + Province of Manitoba 361,826 = 11,096,558. KRW Limited Partnership accounted for on modified equity basis (1 GBE). No schedule of remuneration provided. Long-term investments include KRW Limited Partnership, paintings, and Treaty 2 Development Inc. Construction advances of 242,035 from CMHC included in liabilities.
